name: Telegram Async Return
description: Reliable async result tracking, resend, and recovery for Telegram tasks that outlive the webhook response window.

enabled.label: Enable Telegram Async Return
enabled.help: Enable async task tracking and final-result writeback for Telegram long-running tasks.

storePath.label: State Store Path
storePath.help: Local path for async task state and delivery tracking. SQLite is recommended.

runtimeBin.label: Runtime Binary
runtimeBin.help: Optional override for the async runtime CLI path when not using the default package-installed binary.

ackTemplate.label: Acknowledgement Template
ackTemplate.help: Short Telegram message sent when a task is accepted for background processing.

ackOnAsyncStart.label: Send Background Ack
ackOnAsyncStart.help: Send an immediate Telegram acknowledgement when a task switches into async-return mode.

preferExistingTaskWindowSeconds.label: Reuse Existing Task Window
preferExistingTaskWindowSeconds.help: Time window for preferring an existing in-flight or recently completed task instead of starting a duplicate.

defaultStatusLookbackSeconds.label: Default Status Lookback
defaultStatusLookbackSeconds.help: Default lookback window for recent task lookup when the user asks about a prior long-running task.

autoResendOnDeliveryFailure.label: Auto Resend on Delivery Failure
autoResendOnDeliveryFailure.help: Automatically retry final Telegram delivery when execution succeeded but writeback failed.

resend.label: Resend Policy
resend.help: Retry policy for final Telegram result delivery.

recovery.label: Recovery Policy
recovery.help: Startup reconciliation and recovery settings for unfinished or undelivered tasks.

dedupe.label: Duplicate Detection
dedupe.help: Controls how repeated Telegram follow-ups are matched to existing async tasks.

diagnostics.label: Diagnostics
diagnostics.help: Enable extra lifecycle, delivery, and recovery logs for troubleshooting.
